overall.description: A third-person game scene following a female character walking through a foggy forest at night. The character travels along a dirt path illuminated by vintage street lamps, passing stone walls and entering a cemetery area with monuments. The atmosphere is moody and cinematic with dense fog and dramatic lighting.

ornate black street lamp emitting warm orange light
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense foggy forest at night, following a dirt path. Tall pine trees line both sides as a warm street lamp becomes visible in the distance through the mist.

clusters of white flowers or rocks lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character passes the first vintage street lamp, casting warm orange light on the path. A stone retaining wall appears on the left while clusters of white flowers line the right side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: cemetery entrance with fallen tree archway

segments.scene_description: The character passes under a large fallen tree trunk acting as a natural archway. The scene opens into a cemetery area with stone monuments and pillars visible through the fog.

character looks up at the sky and surrounding trees

segments.scene_description: The character stops in the cemetery clearing among stone tombs and monuments. She looks around and up at the night sky visible through the tall pines, with street lamps providing ambient light.

events.description: character resumes walking along the path
multiple street lamps become visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path toward distant lights, occasionally looking around

entered.detail: multiple light sources visible in the far distance through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the path, leaving the cemetery behind. She walks toward distant street lamps visible through the fog, with the forest opening up slightly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, foggy forest that transitions into a somber cemetery before returning to the wooded trail. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path lined with tall pines, moving toward a distant, warm glow in the mist. As she passes under a vintage street lamp, the lighting shifts to a warm orange hue, illuminating a stone retaining wall and clusters of white flowers. The scene then opens as she passes beneath a fallen tree trunk archway, revealing a cemetery clearing filled with stone monuments and pillars. After a brief pause to look toward the night sky, the camera follows her as she leaves the tombs behind and continues toward further street lamps flickering through the opening forest.
